message:
feat(fnp-python): k74v.2 close 45 core-function passthroughs + family oracle

Shipping the k74v.2 REALITY-CHECK batch of non-ufunc core numpy function
passthroughs. Same variadic *args/**kwargs passthrough pattern as k74v.1.

Casting / dtype predicates (7): astype, can_cast, promote_types,
result_type, issubdtype, isdtype, isfortran.

Rounding aliases (2): around, round.

Dimension-promotion (3): atleast_1d, atleast_2d, atleast_3d.

Functional iteration (2): apply_along_axis, apply_over_axes.

Array-API aliases + block (5): block, cumulative_prod, cumulative_sum,
plus unique_all/unique_counts/unique_inverse/unique_values.

Convolution / correlation / isclose (3): convolve, correlate, isclose.

NaN-aware cumulatives (2): nancumprod, nancumsum.

Misc (4): piecewise, shape, histogram2d, histogramdd.

Busday / datetime (5): busday_count, busday_offset, is_busday,
datetime_as_string, datetime_data.

String-format helpers (4): format_float_positional,
format_float_scientific, binary_repr, base_repr.

Array display (3): array2string, array_repr, array_str.

Registered in module init; module_exports_python_surface extends with
a 42-name assertion loop over all new k74v.2 exports.

Added k74v_2_function_passthroughs_match_numpy_family_oracles covering
one representative case per family via numpy.array_equal. isdtype's
first argument must be a numpy dtype object (not a string) — the test
exercises that contract.

Workspace: 394 fnp-python lib tests passing under parallel cargo test.
